1. Add the commons-codec dependency to pom.xml, OR
2. Replace the DigestUtils usage with Java's built-in MessageDigest

    127: 
    public class TryStmt
128: extends Statement
    129:

    The try statement

    130:

    Java 1.0-6

    131: 
    132:  try {
133:  // ...
134:  } catch (IOException e) {
135:  // ...
136:  } finally {
137:  // ...
138:  }
139:
    140: In this code, "// do things" is the content of the tryBlock, there is one catch clause that catches IOException e, 141: and there is a finally block. 142:

    143: The catch and finally blocks are optional, but they should not be empty at the same time. 144:

    Java 7-8

    145: 
    146:  try (InputStream i = new FileInputStream("file")) {
147:  // ...
148:  } catch (IOException|NullPointerException e) {
149:  // ...
150:  } finally {
151:  // ...
152:  }
153:
    154: Java 7 introduced two things: 155:
      156:
    • Resources can be specified after "try", but only variable declarations (VariableDeclarationExpr.)
      • 157:
    • A single catch can catch multiple exception types. This uses the IntersectionType.
      • 158:
    159:

    Java 9+

    160: 
    161:  try (r) {
162:  // ...
163:  } catch (IOException|NullPointerException e) {
164:  // ...
165:  } finally {
166:  // ...
167:  }
168:
    169: Java 9 finishes resources: you can now refer to a resource that was declared somewhere else. 170: The following types are allowed: 171:
      172:
    • VariableDeclarationExpr: "X x = new X()" like in Java 7-8.
      • 173:
    • NameExpr: "a".
      • 174:
    • FieldAccessExpr: "x.y.z", "super.test" etc.
      • 175:
    176:
    177:
    Author:
    178:
    Julio Vilmar Gesser
    179:
    See Also:
    180:
    CatchClause, 181: IntersectionType, 182: FieldAccessExpr, 183: NameExpr

<path>/workspace/javaparser-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: package github.chains;
2: 
3: import com.github.javaparser.StaticJavaParser;
4: import com.github.javaparser.ast.CompilationUnit;
5: import com.github.javaparser.ast.Modifier;
6: import com.github.javaparser.ast.body.MethodDeclaration;
7: import com.github.javaparser.ast.body.TypeDeclaration;
8: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.MethodCallExpr;
9: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.NameExpr;
10: import com.github.javaparser.ast.stmt.BlockStmt;
11: import com.github.javaparser.ast.stmt.CatchClause;
12: import com.github.javaparser.ast.stmt.ReturnStmt;
13: import com.github.javaparser.ast.stmt.Statement;
14: import com.github.javaparser.ast.stmt.TryStmt;
15: 
16: import java.io.File;
17: import java.io.IOException;
18: 
19: public class Main {
20:     public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
21:         if (args.length < 1) {
22:             System.err.println("Usage: java Main <path-to-java-file>");
23:             System.exit(1);
24:         }
25: 
26:         String filePath = args[0];
27:         File file = new File(filePath);
28:         
29:         if (!file.exists()) {
30:             System.err.println("File not found: " + filePath);
31:             System.exit(1);
32:         }
33: 
34:         CompilationUnit cu = StaticJavaParser.parse(file);
35:         
36:         boolean modified = false;
37:         
38:         // Remove the DigestUtils import
39:         cu.getImports().removeIf(imp -> imp.getNameAsString().equals("org.apache.commons.codec.digest.DigestUtils"));
40:         
41:         // Add required imports for MessageDigest, BigInteger, StandardCharsets
42:         if (!cu.getImports().stream().anyMatch(imp -> imp.getNameAsString().equals("java.security.MessageDigest"))) {
43:             cu.addImport("java.security.MessageDigest");
44:             modified = true;
45:         }
46:         if (!cu.getImports().stream().anyMatch(imp -> imp.getNameAsString().equals("java.math.BigInteger"))) {
47:             cu.addImport("java.math.BigInteger");
48:             modified = true;
49:         }
50:         if (!cu.getImports().stream().anyMatch(imp -> imp.getNameAsString().equals("java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets"))) {
51:             cu.addImport("java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets");
52:             modified = true;
53:         }
54:         
55:         // Find and replace DigestUtils.md5Hex calls
56:         cu.findAll(MethodCallExpr.class).stream()
57:             .filter(mce -> mce.getScope().isPresent() && 
58:                    mce.getScope().get().toString().equals("DigestUtils") &&
59:                    mce.getNameAsString().equals("md5Hex"))
60:             .forEach(mce -> {
61:                 mce.getScope().ifPresent(scope -> {
62:                     scope.replace(new NameExpr("Main"));
63:                 });
64:                 modified = true;
65:             });
66:         
67:         // Add md5Hex helper method to the class
68:         cu.findAll(TypeDeclaration.class).forEach(type -> {
69:             boolean hasMd5Hex = false;
70:             for (var member : type.getMembers()) {
71:                 if (member instanceof MethodDeclaration) {
72:                     MethodDeclaration md = (MethodDeclaration) member;
73:                     if (md.getNameAsString().equals("md5Hex")) {
74:                         hasMd5Hex = true;
75:                         break;
76:                     }
77:                 }
78:             }
79:             
80:             if (!hasMd5Hex) {
81:                 MethodDeclaration md5HexMethod = new MethodDeclaration();
82:                 md5HexMethod.addModifier(Modifier.Keyword.PRIVATE);
83:                 md5HexMethod.addModifier(Modifier.Keyword.STATIC);
84:                 md5HexMethod.setName("md5Hex");
85:                 md5HexMethod.setType("String");
86:                 
87:                 md5HexMethod.addParameter("String", "input");
88:                 
89:                 BlockStmt body = new BlockStmt();
90:                 
91:                 TryStmt tryStmt = new TryStmt();
92:                 BlockStmt tryBlock = new BlockStmt();
93:                 
94:                 Statement md5Stmt = StaticJavaParser.parseStatement(
95:                     "MessageDigest md = MessageDigest.getInstance(\"MD5\");"
96:                 );
97:                 Statement digestStmt = StaticJavaParser.parseStatement(
98:                     "byte[] digestBytes = md.digest(input.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));"
99:                 );
100:                 Statement bigIntStmt = StaticJavaParser.parseStatement(
101:                     "BigInteger bigInt = new BigInteger(1, digestBytes);"
102:                 );
103:                 Statement hexStringStmt = StaticJavaParser.parseStatement(
104:                     "String hexString = bigInt.toString(16);"
105:                 );
106:                 Statement padStmt = StaticJavaParser.parseStatement(
107:                     "while (hexString.length() < 32) hexString = \"0\" + hexString;"
108:                 );
109:                 ReturnStmt returnStmt = new ReturnStmt(new NameExpr("hexString"));
110:                 
111:                 tryBlock.addStatement(md5Stmt);
112:                 tryBlock.addStatement(digestStmt);
113:                 tryBlock.addStatement(bigIntStmt);
114:                 tryBlock.addStatement(hexStringStmt);
115:                 tryBlock.addStatement(padStmt);
116:                 tryBlock.addStatement(returnStmt);
117:                 
118:                 tryStmt.setTryBlock(tryBlock);
119:                 
120:                 CatchClause catchClause = new CatchClause(
121:                     StaticJavaParser.parseParameter("NoSuchAlgorithmException e"),
122:                     new BlockStmt().addStatement(StaticJavaParser.parseStatement("throw new RuntimeException(e)"))
123:                 );
124:                 tryStmt.getCatchClauses().add(catchClause);
125:                 
126:                 body.addStatement(tryStmt);
127:                 md5HexMethod.setBody(body);
128:                 
129:                 type.addMember(md5HexMethod);
130:                 modified = true;
131:             }
132:         });
133:         
134:         if (modified) {
135:             String code = cu.toString();
136:             java.nio.file.Files.writeString(file.toPath(), code);
137:             System.out.println("Transformed: " + filePath);
138:         } else {
139:             System.out.println("No changes needed: " + filePath);
140:         }
141:     }
142: }

(End of file - total 142 lines)
